approval_path_matrix_rows.text:
Vendor Class: TIER_2
Integration Tier: TIER_3
Data Classification: UNREGULATED
Deal Size Range: $50,000 - $250,000
Fast-Track Eligible Required: true
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
Required Approvers: Procurement Manager, IT Security Manager
Estimated Timeline: 2-3 business days
Required Approvals / Notes: Fast-track approval regime for Tier 2 vendor engagements with Tier 3 export-only integration footprint and UNREGULATED data scope. Two approvers required, both non-blocking: Procurement Manager (procurement domain) and IT Security Manager (security domain). No Legal sign-off required when no DPA is triggered. No Business Owner sign-off required at this deal-size band. Timeline: 2-3 business days when both approvers respond promptly. This row applies only when fast_track_eligible is true upstream from STEP-02 and no DPA blocker is active from STEP-03.

Vendor Class: TIER_2
Integration Tier: TIER_2_SAAS
Data Classification: REGULATED
Deal Size Range: $100,000 - $500,000
Fast-Track Eligible Required: false
Approval Path: STANDARD
Required Approvers: Procurement Director, IT Security Manager, Legal Counsel, Business Owner (Director+)
Estimated Timeline: 10-15 business days
Required Approvals / Notes: Standard approval regime for Tier 2 SaaS engagements with REGULATED data scope. Four approvers required: Procurement Director, IT Security Manager, Legal Counsel, Business Owner (Director+). Legal sign-off required because REGULATED data triggers DPA review per DPA-TM-001. IT Security sign-off required for any SaaS integration carrying production credentials. Business Owner (Director+) signs off on commercial terms. Timeline: 10-15 business days when all approvers respond promptly and DPA is fully executed.
